seoTitle: Jordan Springs vs Judds Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Jordan Springs and Judds Creek. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Jordan Springs vs Judds Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Jordan Springs and Judds Creek.
heading: Jordan Springs vs Judds Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jordan Springs, New South Wales and Judds Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Judds Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Jordan Springs (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jordan Springs or Judds Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jordan Springs has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Judds Creek scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jordan Springs scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Judds Creek scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jordan Springs or Judds Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Judds Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
